name: Tomato Bean Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1/2 White onion, peeled and cut into 1/4-inch dice
1 Celery stalk, trimmed and cut into 1/4-inch dice
3 large Ripe tomatoes, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
1 large Potato, peeled and cut into 1/4-inch dice
1 cup Corn, Orange and Tomato relish (see recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the garlic, onion, and celery in 3 tablespoons of vegetable stock for 3 minutes over medium heat.
2. Add the tomatoes and 4 cups of vegetable stock. Continue to cook for 10 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and cook for an additional 10 minutes, until the potato is soft. Adjust seasoning as needed and serve.
Serving size: 1 cup (188 calories; 1.6 grams fat; 0 mg cholesterol; 104.4 mg sodium)
Source: Eat More, Weigh Less, by Dean Ornish, M.D./MM by DEEANNE
